options.name: --solution
options.description:
Read the the C# and markdown files from a msbuild
solution (*.sln). If this option is specified, the
'--input' option is ignored.

options.name: --input
options.description:
The root folder for the files to be processed. Files
under this directory are checked against the filters. If
input folder is not specified, the current directory is
used.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output folder where the documentation will be generated
to. The default output folder is
<input|solutionfolder>/docs.

options.name: --csext
options.description:
File extension for the C# source files. Used to identify
source files in the input folder. The default is '.cs'

options.name: --mdext
options.description:
File extension for the markdown files. Used to identify
markdown files in the input folder. The default is '.md'

options.name: --format
options.description:
Format of the outputted documentation; either 'md' or
'html'. Default is 'md'

options.name: --trim
options.description:
Left-trim the comments before processing them to avoid
interpreting them as code blocks.

options.name: --updatetoc
options.description:
Adds processed files that are not already in the TOC
file to it.

options.name: --theme
options.description:
The theme DLL which generates HTML documents according
to page templates. If not specified, the default theme
is used.

options.name: --buildlog
options.description: Path to the build log file.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Outputs information about processed files to the
standard output.

arguments.name: filters
arguments.description: Filters for input files; both source and markdown.
